scene_title: Figura humana sendo absorvida em estrutura digital
narrative_beat: Metade corpo metade dados entre extase e terror

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human figure in gold and crimson robes being absorbed and merged with luminous digital structure half vibrant human body half data architecture with ambiguous expression between ecstasy and terror in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the ambiguous expression between ecstasy and terror as the figure merges with data
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated mirror corridor with infinitely multiplying reflections in background
props: human figure in gold and crimson robes

environment.time_of_day: moment of digital death and artificial life

lighting.fill_light: cold data fill on digital half
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on human edges dissolving

mood.emotion: upload consciousness — death that does not die — Revelation 9:6

symbolism.primary: the man becoming the server — the image absorbing its creator
symbolism.secondary: mirrors multiplying to infinity as the recursion of digital copies of the self

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
